subject: SiteFyer
value: SiteFyer

source.conversation_topic: SiteSucker replacement and FYER product naming

subject: SiteFyer
value: Replace Mandla's dependency on SiteSucker with a FYER ecosystem product for mirroring, studying and eventually comparing publicly delivered websites.

value.Mirror Mode: Download and preserve publicly delivered website pages and assets for practical offline use.
value.Study Mode: Generate page, navigation, metadata, asset, form, SEO, accessibility, screenshot and structural reports for clean-room learning and original rebuilding.
value.Compare Mode: Revisit a mirrored site and identify public-front-end additions, removals and changes.

subject: SiteFyer V1
value: V1 is Mirror Mode only. Study Mode, Compare Mode, cloud collaboration and heavy rendered-site crawling must not delay the first reliable mirror release.

subject: SiteFyer V1 Mirror Mode
value: HTML pages
CSS files
JavaScript files
Images
SVG files
Fonts
Favicons
Web manifests
PDFs
Other publicly linked documents
Video files directly hosted by the website
Assets referenced inside CSS
Assets referenced through srcset
Assets referenced through picture elements
Assets referenced through inline styles

source.conversation_topic: SiteFyer V1 Mirror Mode resource scope

subject: SiteFyer V1 Mirror Mode
value: Crawl public internal pages through internal links and XML sitemaps
Inspect CSS imports, JavaScript imports and common HTML asset references
Count the discovered file set before bulk downloading
Show the remaining-file countdown while downloading
Preserve or recreate a sensible directory structure
Avoid duplicate resource downloads
Rewrite internal page and asset references to local paths where possible
Record requested, downloaded, skipped and failed resources in a crawl manifest
Checkpoint queues and downloaded blobs in IndexedDB
Resume after browser reload or internet interruption
Export the complete result as one ZIP

value.crawler: Browser crawler using direct CORS access, optional custom proxy and fallback public proxy routes
value.persistence: IndexedDB stores the crawl queue, job state and downloaded blobs
value.interruption_recovery: Waits while offline, continues when online, and offers resume after reload
value.packaging: JSZip builds a complete downloadable archive in the browser
value.app_shell: Service worker caches SiteFyer's own interface
value.hardware_constraint: Designed to remain practical on Mandla's Early-2015 Intel MacBook Air with 4 GB RAM, subject to browser storage and ZIP-memory limits

subject: SiteFyer crawling scope
value: SiteFyer works with files and pages publicly delivered by websites. It does not log into private systems, bypass paywalls or access controls, reconstruct private backends or databases, or extract protected streaming-platform media.

value.WebPfyer: Convert and optimise downloaded images and web assets
value.BrandFyer: Organise discovered logos, colours and brand assets
value.Fyer: Manage SiteFyer projects inside the main creative workspace

subject: SiteFyer V1
value: The first browser-based SiteFyer Mirror Mode implementation was committed to MandlaLee/SiteFyer. It includes whole-site discovery through links and sitemaps, asset extraction, count-first flow, remaining-file countdown, IndexedDB checkpoints, online recovery, local-reference rewriting, crawl manifest generation, ZIP export, service-worker app-shell caching and a GitHub Pages workflow.

subject: SiteFyer V1
value: Enable GitHub Pages with GitHub Actions if required, wait for deployment, then perform end-to-end browser tests against a small multi-page site and a larger real site. Verify proxy compatibility, exact page discovery, interruption recovery, ZIP integrity, rewritten offline links, large files, browser storage quota and performance on Mandla's 4 GB Intel Mac.
